title: elaeagnus pungens f. variegata
intro: Elaeagnus pungens f. variegata, also known as the silver variegated Russian olive or silverbush, is a deciduous shrub native to Asia, characterized by its striking silver-gray variegated leaves and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of Elaeagnus pungens f. variegata include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and ability to stimulate immune function. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Elaeagnus pungens f. variegata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and immune system function.
